title: A Morning at Home
scene: 起床 → 洗漱 → 房间 → 家人 → 早饭，串成一个早晨的小故事

sentences.text: It is seven o'clock, and everyone in my family wakes up.
sentences.gloss: 七点了，我家每个人都醒了。

sentences.text: First I wash my face, then I brush my teeth.
My baby brother always cries in his bed upstairs.
sentences.gloss: 我的小弟弟总是在楼上的床里哭。

sentences.text: My sister sometimes helps him, and I put my books in my bag.
sentences.gloss: 我姐姐有时候会帮他，我把书放进书包里。

sentences.text: In the kitchen my father puts bread, eggs and milk on the table.
sentences.gloss: 在厨房里，爸爸把面包、鸡蛋和牛奶放到桌上。

sentences.text: "It is time for breakfast!" he says. "Are you ready, Ana?"
sentences.gloss: 他说：“该吃早饭了！安娜，你准备好了吗？”

sentences.text: We eat together, and everyone is happy; my grandmother smiles at the door.
sentences.gloss: 我们一起吃饭，大家都很开心；奶奶在门口笑着。

sentences.text: This is a morning in my home.
sentences.gloss: 这就是我家的一个早晨。
